[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101100000 3
1 011001111 6
2 001111110 6
3 011000001 3
4 110100101 5
5 000111011 5
6 111001110 6
7 101100000 3

01 10 011000000 2
12 21 010000001 2
23 32 000100001 2
34 43 000001010 2
45 54 101000000 2
56 65 001000000 1
67 76 010001100 3
70 07 110000000 2

02 20 110100000 3
13 31 000000001 1
24 42 110000100 3
35 53 000100000 1
46 64 011001110 5
57 75 100000000 1
60 06 011000010 3
71 17 010000000 1

03 30 000100010 2
14 41 011000000 2
25 52 100100000 2
36 63 000001011 3
47 74 110001100 4
50 05 101100000 3 match 0 7
61 16 011000001 3 match 3
72 27 110000100 3

04 40 111000010 4
15 51 001000000 1
26 62 010000101 3
37 73 000011000 2
